creator: mi@xxx.video-collage.com
text:
When lyx's configure runs, it somehow checks for "working
	mmap" and says: "no". Having more faith in FreeBSD, I
	extracted the test C-program from the configure script and
	compiled it. It built fine, and when ran exited with the
	0 status code. As I'm not much of ./configure expert, so
	I just set the ``#define HAVE_MMAP'' in src/config.h manualy.
	The lyx built and works so far.

Fix: 

Don't know what's wrong with it. Probably a lyx problem...
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/print/lyx
	make configure |& tee log
	grep mmap log
